import React from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { FileText, BarChart3, History, Building2, TrendingUp } from "lucide-react"; const Dashboard = () => { const features = [ { title: "Modulo A: Facturacion General", description: "Extrae datos de facturas: proveedor, RIF, fecha, periodo, subtotal, IVA, monto total, moneda y tipo.", icon: FileText, link: "/module-a", color: "#0033CC", testId: "card-module-a", }, { title: "Modulo B: Analisis Especializado", description: "Procesa documentos complejos: ventas de terceros, telefonia movil, rentas y servicios, resumen de consumo.", icon: BarChart3, link: "/module-b", color: "#16A34A", testId: "card-module-b", }, { title: "Historial de Documentos", description: "Revisa todos los documentos procesados anteriormente y sus datos extraidos.", icon: History, link: "/history", color: "#EAB308", testId: "card-history", }, { title: "Centros de Costo", description: "Gestiona centros de costo y asigna lineas para el analisis detallado.", icon: Building2, link: "/cost-centers", color: "#DC2626", testId: "card-cost-centers", }, ]; return (
